name: Multi-Context Injection
description: User input is used in multiple different SQL query contexts. Craft a single polyglot payload that works regardless of which context it lands in to extract the flag.
briefing: DataPulse Analytics has a dashboard with a filter parameter that's used in multiple places: a WHERE clause string comparison, a numeric comparison, and a LIKE clause. The input goes to all three queries simultaneously, and you only see the combined results. A single syntax error in any query causes the whole page to fail. Craft a polyglot SQL injection payload — one string that is valid in all contexts — to extract the flag from the 'analytics_keys' table.
objective: Craft a single polyglot SQL payload that works across multiple query contexts to extract the flag from the analytics_keys table.
author: h4ck0rman
